bird.name: 白眶几维
bird.summary: 白眶几维（台湾作奧卡里多褐鷸鴕）（学名：Apteryx rowi），是鹬鸵目鹬鸵科的一种鸟类，栖息在密集的高大的树木组成的森林中。白眶几维体重1924克，翼长0.1毫米，嘴峰长157毫米，喙宽度4.7毫米，喙厚度5.3毫米，跗蹠长84毫米，尾长0.1毫米。白眶几维在其分布区内为…

locations.name: 西岸大区
locations.summary: 西岸（毛利語：Te Tai-poutini，英語：West Coast），位於紐西蘭南島西部的地方行政區。 位於南島西部週邊的地區，面積23276平方公里、人口在30,500人（2006年）。中心城市為葛雷茅斯（Greymouth）、人口…

locations.name: 新西兰
locations.summary: 紐西蘭（英語：New Zealand）又称奥特亚罗瓦（毛利語：Aotearoa，直译：「长白云之乡」），位於太平洋西南部的主權島國，是大英國協紐西蘭王國的主體部分，首都為威靈頓，最大的城市為奧克蘭。紐西蘭主要由兩大島嶼組成：北島（Te I…

locations.name: 南島 (新西蘭)
locations.summary: 南島（英語：South Island；毛利語：Te Wai Pounamu）是组成紐西蘭的兩個主要岛屿之一，与北島被库克海峡隔断。新西兰首都惠灵顿即在南岛对岸，福沃海峡在南面，使之与斯图尔特岛分开。西面为塔斯曼海，东面为南太平洋。該島的毛…

locations.name: Otago Daily Times
locations.summary: The Otago Daily Times (ODT) is a newspaper published by Allied Media Ltd in Dunedin, New Zealand.

relations.subject: 白眶几维
relations.evidence: The Okarito brown kiwi lives in the Okarito forest on the West Coast of New Zealand's South Island. On 29 June 2010, three breeding pairs were released onto Blumine Island as part of a breeding programme. In 2012, twenty rowi were released on Mana Island. A new population was established in the Omoeroa Ranges near Fox Glacier in late 2018. In 2021 signs of rowi were detected in Ballyhooly Bush, remnant mataī forest on the Lower Whataroa River flats, 24 km from Ōkārito forest
relations.object_summary: 迁飞水鸟高度依赖的滨海觅食带。

relations.subject: 白眶几维
relations.evidence: The Okarito kiwi is currently classified as Vulnerable by the IUCN due to habitat loss and predation by introduced stoats. Conservation efforts such as Operation Nest Egg and the stoat control regime have been partially successful in restoring the rowi population
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。
